title: Clinical and Genetic Heterogeneity in a Cohort of Chinese Children With Dopa-Responsive Dystonia.
author: Chen Y Bao X Wen Y Wang J Zhang Q Yan J
content: S-EPMC7058807 PMC7058807 Clinical and Genetic Heterogeneity in a Cohort of Chinese Children With Dopa-Responsive Dystonia. Background: The aim of this study was to investigate the genetic and clinical features of dopa-responsive dystonia (DRD) in China. Method: Characteristics of gene mutations
